case_title: GUADALUPE RAMIREZ VS. FRANCISCO ANTONIO BOLIVAR

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5256 MISSION ST. SF, CA 94112 (ROOM TO THE LEFT IN FRONT OF KITCHEN AS YOU WALK UP THE STAIRS), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF 16.66 PER DAY AND DECLARATION RE: LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, GUADALUPE SERVED NOV-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, FRANCISCO ANTONIO
